name: Josie 19" Velvet/Metal Table Lamp - TBL2030 - Green/Antique Brass - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Josie Table Lamp, where design meets elegance. This piece features a harmonious blend of green and antique brass, creating a captivating visual effect. The metal body provides a strong and sophisticated base, while the velvet shade offers a soft touch, diffusing light gently for a warm and inviting atmosphere. Whether placed in a cozy living room or a stylish bedroom, the Josie Table Lamp adds a chic accent to any decor, complementing traditional and contemporary styles alike. Its size and color make it a versatile choice for those seeking an elegant yet understated lighting solution. Transform your environment with this striking piece and enjoy the ambiance it creates.
